reference: Since there is no blood loss, I suppose the problem is with the absorption of iron. Before conducting costly tests, it is better to try parenteral iron supplementation after due precautions in a hospital setup, which may help you to some extent. There are some conditions that fall under iron-refractory iron deficiency anemia.
